text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: There's something I wanna do for you, Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Your nails!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wha... What?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
It's okay! The manager here is chill. They said as long the nail polish
doesn't smell too strong, they don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So, like, what color should we do? This pink is fire!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I do like pink, but... Um... What's this all about?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Well, 'cuz like...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You've lowkey been looking kinda sad lately, but like, I'm not that
good with words and stuff, so... I didn't wanna hurt your feelings or
anything.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I suck at this kinda thing. I don't know how to cheer people
up, especially chill, quiet girls like you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I tried to comfort my classmate once and I flopped. She said she
wasn't "feeling up for fun right now."

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Then someone else went to comfort her and she felt better right
away. I felt kinda useless, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But, like... I'm just like everyone else—I want my friends to feel better
too.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Jordan...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
We're all different, right? So it's okay if we all show our feelings in
different ways. I thought I'd try the best way I know how!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: And that's with a lit manicure! Here, give me your hands!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you! I didn't realize you were thinking about me!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry I didn't notice.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Nah, don't be silly!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I know I'm pretty stupid, but that doesn't make me useless,
y'know? And you're small, but you're not useless either.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
We're all unique, and that's a good thing. I bet there's stuff only you
can do too!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well... if you need anything, I've got your back, bestie. So just
hit me up.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Well, in that case... Can I ask you something? It's...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: For real?! That sounds dope!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: R-really? I'll give it a try then!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Nom, nom... Gulp. Ah, there's nothing better than hotpot in the winter! Huh? Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin O, Flash, apologies for bothering you during your lunch
break. Flash, I have a request for you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: What is it?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I'd like your feedback on this recipe I created. My objective is to
make the best chocolates possible to give to friends.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh, that looks mouthwatering!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hehe, those chocolate macarons do look delicious. Hmm, let's see...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The key to making good macarons is folding the batter. It's important
to incorporate just the right amount of air into it. And then...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I see. I will save this to my memory logs.
